scripts.dev: node -e "const pm = process.env.npm_execpath && process.env.npm_execpath.includes('pnpm') ? 'pnpm' : 'npm'; const args = pm === 'pnpm' ? ['--filter', '@workspace/eyepay', 'dev'] : ['run', 'dev', '--workspace=@workspace/eyepay']; require('child_process').spawn(pm, args, { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true })"
scripts.build: node -e "const pm = process.env.npm_execpath && process.env.npm_execpath.includes('pnpm') ? 'pnpm' : 'npm'; require('child_process').execSync(pm === 'pnpm' ? 'pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build' : 'npm run typecheck && npm run build --workspaces --if-present', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
scripts.typecheck: node -e "const pm = process.env.npm_execpath && process.env.npm_execpath.includes('pnpm') ? 'pnpm' : 'npm'; require('child_process').execSync(pm === 'pnpm' ? 'pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter \"./artifacts/**\" --filter \"./scripts\" --if-present run typecheck' : 'npm run typecheck:libs && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
